Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Final Sword]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — The Final Sword is an adaptation of the Sword Sage’s strike designed by Lindon and Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — The Final Sword is a massive madra replica of Yerin's weapon.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon mentions the Final Sword in relation to Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — The Final Sword is a technique Yerin cycles for.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Yerin poured madra and aura into a Final Sword.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — The Final Sword is a technique that can spear through a flock of venomous birds.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — The Final Sword requires aura to use.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin's Final Sword is a silver-red sword of light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin unleashed the Final Sword.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — The Final Sword is a technique named by Yerin and the Phoenix.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
